top_signals.title: phpBB forum fixes auth bypass bug lurking for a decade
top_signals.summary: A 10-year-old authentication bypass vulnerability discovered in the phpBB forum software allows an attacker to log in as any user, including administrators. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Switzerland is voting on whether to cap its population at 10 million. Here's what to know
top_signals.summary: Switzerland votes on a population cap that could tighten immigration and put its EU free-movement agreement under pressure.

top_signals.title: Takaichi vows ‘persistent diplomatic efforts’ to help secure Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Writing in the Financial Times, the prime minister expressed her determination to tackle emerging challenges as "Japan's 'Iron Lady.'"
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
